naive_f1_result.note: No false Event-Horizon claim was ever emitted (the run stopped at per-rate checkpoints). Adversarial review (Section 16) found the emit path was still ARMED by default in gptoss_gravity_run.py (would have emitted 'Event Horizon 2.0 BPW' on the real checkpoints). processes.note: No hawking worker of any kind is running. Top CPU is the SEPARATE MoP project (mop-final-mechanic-* at ~100% x6+), not hawking.

stale_job_disposition.why_superseded: Weight-space RVQ/low-rank reconstruction is a PROXY, not the protected capability contract. Superseded by the Forge foundry (materially-distinct families + output-space evidence). NOT reinterpreted as a final result.
